entries.source: Yes. Schools can use the public product first, then discuss custom AI learning spaces with school-specific workflows, confidentiality, and funded access options.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Shule zinaweza kutumia bidhaa ya umma kwanza, kisha kujadili nafasi maalum za kujifunza kwa AI zenye mitiririko maalum ya shule, usiri, na chaguo za ufikiaji unaofadhiliwa.

entries.source: Yes. Subject hubs are public pages built for learners, Google, and AI answer engines. They expose only public learning guidance and public guest-mode URLs, not private saved chats.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Vituo vya masomo ni kurasa za umma zilizojengwa kwa wanafunzi, Google, na injini za majibu za AI. Huonyesha tu mwongozo wa umma wa kujifunza na URL za umma za hali ya mgeni, si gumzo binafsi zilizohifadhiwa.

entries.source: Yes. Teachers and school leaders can use the public prompt library to evaluate learning behaviors before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Walimu na viongozi wa shule wanaweza kutumia maktaba ya umma ya vidokezo kutathmini tabia za kujifunza kabla ya kujadili usambazaji maalum wa shule.

entries.source: Yes. The guide library links into public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, flashcards, and historical conversations.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Maktaba ya miongozo huunganisha na hali za umma za wageni kama Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, maswali, flashcards, na mazungumzo ya kihistoria.

entries.source: Yes. The historical person mode is a learning simulation for perspective and questioning. It should not be cited as an authenticated quotation.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Hali ya mhusika wa kihistoria ni uigaji wa kujifunza kwa kuchukua mtazamo na kuuliza maswali. Haipaswi kunukuliwa kama nukuu iliyothibitishwa.

entries.source: Yes. The linked public learning modes open in guest mode, so learners can try explanations, Socratic questions, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, and more without starting from a marketing page.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Hali za umma za kujifunza zilizounganishwa hufunguka katika hali ya mgeni, ili wanafunzi waweze kujaribu maelezo, maswali ya Kisokrati, kocha wa kazi za nyumbani, maswali, flashcards, na zaidi bila kuanzia kwenye ukurasa wa masoko.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest learning modes are designed for free access, so learners can start without needing a school deployment or paid account.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Hali za umma za kujifunza kama mgeni zimeundwa kwa ufikiaji wa bure, ili wanafunzi waanze bila kuhitaji usambazaji wa shule au akaunti ya kulipia.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes and audience pages are designed so parents can inspect the learning behavior before relying on it.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Hali za umma za wageni na kurasa za hadhira zimeundwa ili wazazi waweze kukagua tabia ya kujifunza kabla ya kuitegemea.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Hali za umma za wageni huwawezesha viongozi wa shule na walimu kujaribu uzoefu wa kujifunza kabla ya kujadili usambazaji maalum wa shule.

entries.source: Yes. The public Homework Coach is available at /chat/homework-coach, and this subject hub links to the supporting modes and guides.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Homework Coach ya umma inapatikana katika /chat/homework-coach, na kituo hiki cha somo huunganisha na hali na miongozo inayounga mkono.

entries.source: Yes. The recommended use is hints, explanations, step checks, feedback, and review prompts rather than final answers you cannot explain.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Matumizi yanayopendekezwa ni vidokezo, maelezo, ukaguzi wa hatua, mrejesho, na vidokezo vya marudio badala ya majibu ya mwisho ambayo huwezi kuyaeleza.

entries.source: Yes. Use Time Travel for context, History Cause and Effect for argument structure, Debate for counterarguments, and Source Critic for evidence boundaries.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Tumia Time Travel kwa muktadha, History Cause and Effect kwa muundo wa hoja, Debate kwa hoja pinzani, na Source Critic kwa mipaka ya ushahidi.

entries.source: You are solely responsible for your conduct and any data, text, information, screen names, graphics, photos, profiles, audio and video clips, links ("Content") that you submit, post, and display on the inspir platform. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) uses the collected data for various purposes: To provide and maintain our Service To notify you about changes to our Service To allow you to participate in interactive features of our Service when you choose to do so to provide customer support To gather analysis or valuable information so that we can improve our Service To monitor the usage of our Service to detect, prevent and address technical issues To fulfil any other purpose for which you provide it To carry out our obligations and enforce our rights arising from any contracts entered into between you and us, including for billing and collection To provide you with notices about your account and/or subscription, including expiration and renewal notices, email-instructions, etc To provide you with news, special offers and general information about other goods, services and events which we offer that are similar to those that you have already purchased or enquired about unless you have opted not to receive such information In any other way we may describe when you provide the information For any other purpose with your consent
entries.value: Unawajibika kikamilifu kwa mwenendo wako na data, maandishi, taarifa, majina ya skrini, michoro, picha, wasifu, klipu za sauti na video, viungo ("Content") unazowasilisha, kuchapisha, na kuonyesha kwenye jukwaa la inspir. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) hutumia data iliyokusanywa kwa madhumuni mbalimbali: Kutoa na kudumisha Service yetu Kukuarifu kuhusu mabadiliko ya Service yetu Kukuruhusu kushiriki katika vipengele shirikishi vya Service yetu unapochagua kufanya hivyo kutoa msaada kwa wateja Kukusanya uchambuzi au taarifa zenye thamani ili tuweze kuboresha Service yetu Kufuatilia matumizi ya Service yetu kugundua, kuzuia na kushughulikia matatizo ya kiufundi Kutimiza madhumuni mengine yoyote ambayo unaitolea Kutekeleza wajibu wetu na haki zetu zinazotokana na mikataba yoyote iliyoingiwa kati yako na sisi, ikiwemo kwa bili na ukusanyaji Kukupatia notisi kuhusu akaunti na/au usajili wako, ikiwemo notisi za kuisha muda na kusasishwa, maelekezo ya barua pepe, n.k. Kukupatia habari, ofa maalum na taarifa za jumla kuhusu bidhaa, huduma na matukio mengine tunayotoa yanayofanana na yale uliyonunua au kuulizia tayari isipokuwa umechagua kutopokea taarifa hizo Kwa namna nyingine yoyote ambayo tunaweza kueleza unapotoa taarifa Kwa madhumuni mengine yoyote kwa idhini yako

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Unaweza pia kuanza na toleo lisilo kamili la tatizo lako halisi. Kidokezo cha kwanza kisicho safi ni sawa. Kipindi kinaweza kufafanua kiwango, hadhira, muda wa mwisho, na mtindo mara tu unapoanza.

entries.source: You can contact our Copyright Agent via email at support@inspir.app
entries.value: Unaweza kuwasiliana na Copyright Agent wetu kupitia barua pepe kwa support@inspir.app

entries.source: You can try the format in Talk to a Historical Person. If you want the wider scene before meeting a person, use Time Travel to visit a period, inspect constraints, and then ask what choices people actually had.
entries.value: Unaweza kujaribu muundo katika Talk to a Historical Person. Ikiwa unataka mandhari pana kabla ya kukutana na mtu, tumia Time Travel kutembelea kipindi, kuchunguza vikwazo, kisha kuuliza watu walikuwa na chaguo gani kweli.

entries.source: You know a Socratic AI tutor worked when the learner can do three things:
entries.value: Unajua mkufunzi wa AI wa Kisokrati amefanya kazi wakati mwanafunzi anaweza kufanya mambo matatu:

entries.source: You may provide us either directly at support@inspir.app or via third party sites and tools with information and feedback concerning errors, suggestions for improvements, ideas, problems, complaints, and other matters related to our Service (“Feedback”). You acknowledge and agree that: (i) you shall not retain, acquire or assert any intellectual property right or other right, title or interest in or to the Feedback; (ii) Company may have development ideas similar to the Feedback; (iii) Feedback does not contain confidential information or proprietary information from you or any third party; and (iv) Company is not under any obligation of confidentiality with respect to the Feedback. In the event the transfer of the ownership to the Feedback is not possible due to applicable mandatory laws, you grant Company and its affiliates an exclusive, transferable, irrevocable, free-of-charge, sub-licensable, unlimited and perpetual right to use (including copy, modify, create derivative works, publish, distribute and commercialize) Feedback in any manner and for any purpose.
entries.value: Unaweza kutupatia moja kwa moja kupitia support@inspir.app au kupitia tovuti na zana za wahusika wa tatu taarifa na mrejesho kuhusu hitilafu, mapendekezo ya maboresho, mawazo, matatizo, malalamiko, na masuala mengine yanayohusiana na Service yetu (“Feedback”). Unakiri na kukubali kwamba: (i) hutahifadhi, kupata, au kudai haki yoyote ya miliki au haki nyingine, umiliki, au maslahi katika au kwa Feedback; (ii) Company inaweza kuwa na mawazo ya maendeleo yanayofanana na Feedback; (iii) Feedback haina taarifa za siri au taarifa za umiliki kutoka kwako au kwa mhusika yeyote wa tatu; na (iv) Company haina wajibu wowote wa usiri kuhusiana na Feedback. Ikiwa uhamisho wa umiliki wa Feedback hauwezekani kutokana na sheria za lazima zinazotumika, unaipa Company na washirika wake haki ya kipekee, inayoweza kuhamishwa, isiyoweza kubatilishwa, isiyo na malipo, inayoweza kupewa leseni ndogo, isiyo na kikomo na ya kudumu ya kutumia (ikiwemo kunakili, kurekebisha, kuunda kazi zinazotokana nayo, kuchapisha, kusambaza na kuifanya kibiashara) Feedback kwa namna yoyote na kwa madhumuni yoyote.

entries.source: You may submit a notification pursuant to the Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA) by providing our Copyright Agent with the following information in writing (see 17 U.S.C 512(c)(3) for further detail):
entries.value: Unaweza kuwasilisha notisi kwa mujibu wa Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA) kwa kumpatia Copyright Agent wetu taarifa zifuatazo kwa maandishi (tazama 17 U.S.C 512(c)(3) kwa maelezo zaidi):

entries.source: You may use Service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with Terms. You agree not to use Service:
entries.value: Unaweza kutumia Service kwa madhumuni halali tu na kwa mujibu wa Terms. Unakubali kutotumia Service:

entries.value: Haki Zako za Ulinzi wa Data Chini ya General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)

entries.value: Haki Zako za Ulinzi wa Data chini ya California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA)

entries.value: Haki Zako za Ulinzi wa Data chini ya California Privacy Protection Act (CalOPPA)

entries.source: Your information, including Personal Data, may be transferred to – and maintained on – computers located outside of your state, province, country or other governmental jurisdiction where the data protection laws may differ from those of your jurisdiction. If you are located outside India and choose to provide information to us, please note that we transfer the data, including Personal Data, to India and process it there. Your consent to this Privacy Policy followed by your submission of such information represents your agreement to that transfer. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) will take all the steps reasonably necessary to ensure that your data is treated securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy and no transfer of your Personal Data will take place to an organisation or a country unless there are adequate controls in place including the security of your data and other personal information.
entries.value: Taarifa zako, ikiwemo Personal Data, zinaweza kuhamishwa kwenda, na kuhifadhiwa kwenye, kompyuta zilizo nje ya jimbo, mkoa, nchi, au mamlaka nyingine ya serikali ambako sheria za ulinzi wa data zinaweza kutofautiana na zile za mamlaka yako. Ikiwa uko nje ya India na unachagua kutupatia taarifa, tafadhali kumbuka kwamba tunahamisha data, ikiwemo Personal Data, kwenda India na kuichakata huko. Ridhaa yako kwa Privacy Policy hii ikifuatiwa na uwasilishaji wako wa taarifa hizo inawakilisha makubaliano yako na uhamisho huo. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) itachukua hatua zote zinazohitajika kwa busara kuhakikisha kwamba data yako inashughulikiwa kwa usalama na kwa mujibu wa Privacy Policy hii na hakuna uhamisho wa Personal Data yako kwenda shirika au nchi utakaofanyika isipokuwa kuna udhibiti wa kutosha uliopo, ikiwemo usalama wa data yako na taarifa nyingine binafsi.
